name: Buttercream Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and shortening using an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the vanilla extract and mix well.
3. Gradually add the confectioners sugar, one cup at a time, mixing on medium speed after each addition to ensure there are no lumps.
4. Scrape the sides and bottom of the bowl frequently during the process.
5. Once all the sugar is incorporated, the icing will appear dry.
6. Add the milk and continue beating the mixture on medium speed until it becomes light and fluffy.
7. Cover the icing with a damp cloth when not in use to prevent drying out.
8. For optimal results, store the icing in the refrigerator when not needed; this can extend its shelf life up to two weeks.
9. If the icing has hardened, rewhip it before using.
